---
title: "Elizabeth Welman Seymour"
---

## Elizabeth Welman Seymour

**Dates:** (d. 26 September 1868)

**Maiden name:** (Noel)

### Description

aunt of Edith Jacob

### Biography

She was wife of the Rev. George Augustus Seymour (1828/9-1909), Rector of Holy Trinity, Winchester.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 3d [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
